features.name: conditional_with_zero_alternative_in_arithmetic
features.description: Code should include a conditional expression with a zero alternative used as an operand in an arithmetic addition operation

features.name: equivalent_restructure_candidate
features.description: Code should include a conditional expression where the else branch is zero and the true branch performs addition, representing a restructure candidate that Yosys should optimize equivalently

features.name: mux_with_zero_operand
features.description: Code should include a multiplexer construct where one operand is zero, which should be optimizable to a conditional addition or subtraction
features.snippet:
logic [3:0] mux_out;
assign mux_out = s ? y : 4'b0;
